entry.title: Re: Mexico DRC - Invoice rejected - schema xml issue
entry.content: In addition, the attributes "TipoOperacion" and "Subdivision" must be removed, in the section "Emisor" Nodo "Domicilio" is now mandatory.

entry.title: Re: Crystal report run time engine
entry.content: Why is it this hard to download Crystal Reports 2016 (v13.x) runtime? I can't find it!

entry.title: Re: View on Enitity overwrites Entity on Save in Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Tanja,

The problem is the composition, not the association. Unfortunately we don't support your second example out of the box as well, it's not clear how a POST request should work in the case of this filter.

To implement the described scenario with different services please either consult with UI experts if it's possible to filter out the results with values equal or not equal to TRANSFERED or consider to do it with the custom coding for example in the srv.before('SAVE', 'MyEntity', /*...*/) handler. 

Best regards,

Olena

entry.content:

Thant for you reply.

Is there a BAPI equivalent to MB52? or any BAPI that return material, plant, location, batch, and stock? 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Decommission / Sunset of SRM system

entry.title: Re: Specific goal in the form
entry.content:
I think the other individual meant to say it is "not" possible today.  What is possible however is to pull in goals based on category, as per this documentation.   https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/8aaa9ac9177d482e8e6597e509237656/ffebcb932b284b33a7ec2d8c6da3e44c.html?q=goal%20status

This might present a work around to your requirement, depending on how you define categories for the goal plan template.

entry.title: Decommission SRM system
entry.content:
Our client would like to decomission SRM before migrating to S/4 Hana.

We have the extended classic scenario, where we have Bids and PO created on SRM, and transfered to our backend ECC.

ECC will not be decomissionned, as our client want to create bids ans PO in ECC instead of SRM. 

Anyone can share his experience? procedure? notes? the best steps to follow 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Mastering SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine for RAG-driven LLM Applications: An Insightful Guide
entry.content: The embedding would be the interesting part.

entry.title: Re: SAC; Story; tryStatement
entry.content:
Hi,

this is currently not possible. I use a workaround with the if() clause.

For example I have a variable which is a selection from a Table:

var selection = Table_1.getSelections()[0];

Normally, the function getSelections() returns of Type Selection. However, if the user clicks on the dimension title instead of a dimension member, the function getSelections() would return unassigned which could later lead to a TypeError, if the variable is later used.

To avoid an error message being shown or to show an alternative Error, you can use an if() clause for the code snippet using this variable:

if(selection) {
YOUR CODE
}

 For an alternative Error-Message you can use the else statement:

else {
Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error,"Your Text");
}

 This method should also work for other use cases beside the TypeError.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: RAP # Create only mode issue # create screen not edit...
entry.content: Hi Oleg, No syntax errors. It's managed

entry.title: Re: Localization (i18n) on Rap application not working

add that to the field in your cds.

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content: Hi Santosh

entry.title: How can we get one cloud alm tenant data into another cloud alm tenant and using which api?
entry.content:
Hi,
if we have two cloud alm tenants (one is ours, and the other one is customer's) then how can we get the data from customer cloud alm tenant to our cloud alm tenant using an api?
Which api should we use for this? 
can you please provide detailed procedure.
Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How can we get one cloud alm tenant data into another...
entry.content:
This use case is not supported for the SAP Cloud ALM APIs. 

SAP Cloud ALM tenants do not have the capability to accept data from a Customer specified API source (even an SAP Cloud ALM API).
There is no way for SAP Cloud ALM to receive data from an inbound API.
So you cannot use the SAP Cloud ALM outbound APIs as a data source into another SAP Cloud ALM tenant. 
SAP Cloud ALM tenants only receive data about the systems in the Customer landscape.

The SAP Cloud ALM APIs are intended to be used to create custom dashboards or tools to supplement the existing data display (e.g. create a dashboard with all use case metrics for a single system), or to integrate with workflows in external systems (e.g. create an SAP Cloud ALM task based on a Jira ticket, etc.).

If an external tool/software has some kind of mechanism to be able to use an API and fetch data, it can be configured to use the SAP Cloud ALM outbound REST APIs to fetch data from the tenant. 
If the external tool/software cannot make API requests then there is no way to get the data the third party system. 

One such example is configuring SAP Analytics Cloud to fetch SAP Cloud ALM Analytics data via the relevant API.
This community blog post has more information on creating those configurations and connections. 

For more information about how to use the SAP Cloud ALM outbound REST APIs, refer to the documentation on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub. 
You will need to read the "API reference" pages in each API to get a full understanding of what they can do, and how to use them.

entry.title: Re: Issue with CPI ODATA Query - filter !
entry.content:
KBA 3287986 mentions that you can use the HTTP adapter as a workaround instead of the OData adapter because those queries are not currently supported for OData.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

i have already used both options and both were working properly. First i used my S-User and then we need to Service User for the Integration. We used also client ID client secret together. You can check your service key. 

Best Regards,

Burak

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Doesn't look like the string you are hashing is correct. But we push all the hashing stuff in the app so you shouldn't use Postman 😲

If you find the place to tap on your phone, the string will be put in the correct input box on the hashing page and then you can hash it there and open up this page to reply.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation bpmworkflowruntime 404 error for Creating Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm implementing a SAP Build Process Automation project for a customer, and I'm using the predefined template "Purchase Requisition Header Approval and Release" from the SAP Build Marketplace. This process come with an UI5 app (sap.ibpm.CreatePR). I followed all the documentation delivered by SAP with this template, and I'm able via CPI to communicate and create the purchase requisitions into the customer ECC system.

But unfortunately the workflow is not triggered, as the API /bpmworkflowruntime/public/workflow/rest/v1/workflow-instances send me back a 404 response. I created all the destinations and instances, and also followed blogs about upgrading from the old BTP Workflow service to SAP Build Process Automation (for xs-app and mta.yaml files) but still no results. I am a little bit lost to know what to debug and correct there.

here is the instance :

And my destinations :

Could you help me know what I missed in there ?

entry.title: Re: Whenever I use a custom action, it opens a new object...
entry.content: You have to either declare the action to not return a result or fill results if you have declared that it will return results. See the RAP tutorial for custom actions for how to fill result with the instance the action is acting on.

entry.title: Re: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on ev...
entry.content: Hi Natwelch, this can be tricky sometimes and will also depend on how your report is designed. Have a look at the sample report here and see if this technique works for you. It involves using a blank Group in order to create the main report's Page Header...this is because suppressing a real Page Header with a variable doesn't always work due to evaluation times. There is a counter that is incremented on the section containing the subreport and is reset in the section after.

entry.title: Restrict list of legal entities a manager can choose from when adding a new recruit to onboarding
entry.content:
Hi all, hoping someone may have found a solution for the problem we're having.

With over 2000 stores globally and each one their own legal entity, the picklist the manager has to wade through is very unwieldy. Throw in the fact that stores are very similar or the same in some cases (i.e. same town name in two or more different countries), there is a risk that the manager will choose the wrong one. 

Ideally, we would like to restrict the legal entities (companies) that a manager can choose from when adding a new recruit to onboarding - at the very least by the country that the manager works in, or - even better - from the list of legal entities that the manager is linked to (primary and secondary work locations).

Is this possible, and if so, how do we go about doing this? I've searched for an answer but I can't find anything to support making this change.

Thanks

entry.title: Pricing - Volume discount by item group total
entry.content:
We have a pricing scenario whereby a volume discount is given depending on the total quantity of items ordered from a particular Item Group.

So let’s say we sell Black, Blue and Red pens in an item group called Pens.  They are £1 each but if you order 50 or more in total, you get 2% off.

Within Volume discounts, I can see how you set up a discount for buying 50+ of each item; but it would need to cater for the fact that you could order 15 red, 20 blue and 25 black - totalling 60 pens and therefore subject to volume discount.  As far as I can see, this functionality doesn’t cater for the total at Group level, only at the individual item level

Within Discount Groups, I can see how you can set up 2% off any volume of the Pens item group, or versions of a “buy-one-get-one free” mechanism, but not how you can give 2% off a total of 50+ pens

I know you could add 2% off the total order or work out the price manually, but firstly we sell many different items on one order and secondly we want this to be automatic so the people keying the sales orders don’t need to type things in manually which is subject to user error

There must be a way to do this (surely we can’t be the only business with this requirement?), so I would be grateful if someone could let me know how it can be done

Thanks

J

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
Hi ReportingMil, are you using the full / standalone version of Crystal Reports? If so create a new formula and write out the logic that you mention but use Crystal formula syntax...not sure how that would be written as there is no indication on what fields determine status, expirations, etc. Afterwards, right click on the existing Group Header and choose Change Group and then use your new formula instead. 

if {your status field} in ["your active value", "your renewal value"]
then "Active or Under Renewal"
else if {your status field} = "renewal" and datediff("d",{your experiration date},currentdate) > 365
then "Expired"
else "Your Default Value"

entry.title: Re: Dynamic data partitioning in BW4/HANA
entry.content:
Can you please check if missing code corrections of SAP Note '3341508 - ADSO: Missing dyn. partitions after remodeling' led to the situation shown in your screenshots?

Regards,
Dominik

entry.title: New Learning Journey: Understanding the Purpose of SAP Commerce Cloud, its Components and User Roles
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm Charis from SAP CX Product Learning team and I have some great news for you! I'm glad to announce that our new Learning Journey is live on learning.sap.com platform: 

Understanding the Purpose of SAP Commerce Cloud, its Components and User Roles​ 

This course offers about 2.5 hours content and aims to provide an introduction about what SAP Commerce Cloud is, and identify the typical tasks and foundational skills for various SAP Commerce Cloud business user interfaces.

Learning Objectives:

  • Describe the purpose and basic elements of SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Learn how the key tasks are the responsibility of certain employee roles.
  • Understand how these employees leverage the platform's powerful user interfaces to enhance the customer experience and increase sales.

The course aims to Business Users and Functional Consultants. It contains very informative content provided in text, diagrams, videos. At the end of each unit, you will be called to answer on quiz questions which will test your understanding on the topic.

Accomplishing this learning journey earns you a SAP Authorized Badge, which will be claimed into your account!

Please don't hesitate to provide any constructive feedback!

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA High Availability, SLD and 'Failed to connect System Landscape Directory(SLD)'
entry.content: I still haven't discovered the cause of the problem. This occurs approximately every 20 days.

entry.title: How to utilize the Trigger Workflow Action in SAP BPA Process Visibility
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to send escalation in SAP BPA based on the workflow status (at risk) using Process visibility Trigger Workflow Action feature by referring https://help.sap.com/docs/process-visibility/process-visibility-capability/trigger-workflow-action. 

One of the main Prerequisites step to trigger the "System based workflow" is selecting the environmental value by creating a destination in SAP BTP. Yet, despite establishing the destination using "OAuth2ClientCredentials" and integrating it with the SAP BPA service key in BTP, the environmental variable remains empty list within Process Visibility.

Can any one please confirm how to configure the destination for configuring the Trigger workflow action in SAP BTP. Kindly find the attached screenshot for reference. 

 

Thanks,

Ranjith

#SAP BPA

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Web Services for Concur Expense - Authentication
entry.content:
@boot9w  Hi Jeff - Have you checked out the documentation on developer.concur.com?    Here is a link that which I think should be helpful.

SAP Concur Developer Center | Identity v4.1

If you scroll down a little from the top of the page, you will see some of the different URI's that are available.

RickF

entry.title: Re: Automatic Creation of One Time Payments from Time Collectors Using Integration Center
entry.content: @eeshwari , thank you for your response. I believe mostly the retrospective updates are allowed. I understand to transfer retrospective changes, an option is to have 'a collector pay component', perhaps a monthly one (for monthly payroll) transferred to payroll so that when there is a change, updated value is transferred which can trigger payroll recalculation. For example I have worked 3 hours of overtime in March which was send to payroll into 'Overtime Collector' pay component as 3 hours. In April I add another hour record for March, which gets added to the total of overtime hours in March and new total is 4. When integration runs the 3 hours in payroll overtime collector pay components would get updated to 4 hours and (as the collector pay component is configured to trigger recalculation) payroll for March will get recalculated to pay 4 overtime hours instead of 3. thank you.

entry.title: Introducing in-place Migration from SAP Intelligent RPA to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In the coming weeks we will enable the ability to upgrade an existing Intelligent RPA tenant for becoming Build Process Automation tenant in few steps. No need to export existing projects and then import projects in another tenant. No need to deploy, create trigger, register agents and so on.

Few steps are required to transform an Intelligent RPA tenant to a Build Process Automation tenant.

Pre-requisites

Let's be clear, we enable the in-place migration to ensure the migration will be smooth and effortless. To that end, we have some requirements to avoid data loss and partial transformation.

  • No more Desktop Studio projects or packages in the tenant
  • No more Maintenance projects in the tenant

If some content block the in-place migration, you can download the details.

We have prepared a SAP Note 3334979 with some details available here.

If everything is good the seven steps are the following:

StepsWhere
Step 1 - Add SAP Build Process Automation entitlements in your tenantBTP Cockpit
Step 2 - Click on "enable migration"Cloud Factory
Step 3 - Subscribe Build Process AutomationBTP Cockpit
Wait a couple of minutes the time the subscription happens and the migration is performed
Step 4 - Add and/or modify the Role CollectionsBTP Cockpit
Step 5 - Connect to Build Process Automation and Check the resultsBuild Process Automation
Step 6 - Check or Update Agents (optional)On-Premise Agents
Step 7 - Unsubscribe (delete) SAP Intelligent RPABTP Cockpit

Before you start

It's a good practice to clean your tenant of unnecessary content no longer used or accurate. As usual it's also a good practice to update to the recent SDKs or Agent version. Check your contract terms as well before.

The steps

Step 1 - Add SAP Build Process Automation entitlements in your tenant

For subscribing to Build Process Automation, some entitlements are required. Otherwise, you won't be able to go further. Assuming your global account has already the corresponding entitlements (you need to check with your contract) here the steps for a given sub-account:

 

 

Click on "Entitlements"
Click "Edit"
Click "Add Service Plans"
Search for "Build"

Select the different services and options such as 

  • Standard (Application)
  • automation-attended
  • automation-unattended
  • standard-user
  • advanced-user
  • api-calls

 

Add the Service Plans

Configure the values

You can now "Save"

Your sub-account is ready to subscribe Build Process Automation.

Step 2 - Click on "Enable migration"

 

Connect Cloud Factory as Officer. A new tile should be displayed.
The button "Enable Migration" would be shown. Click and a confirmation is required.

Your tenant is now Enabled for the migration and it will unlock the dual subscription.

If the tile is displayed this instead
Download the report and fix the blockers. More details will come in the documentation. 

Step 3 - Subscribe Build Process Automation

You can either subscribe within your sub-account or use the Booster:

The procedure is well described in the documentation here.

Migration from Intelligent RPA to Build Process Automation is a one-way upgrade, irrevocable. After the confirmation, please note that the Cloud Factory will be unavailable and all jobs won't launch. So plan the migration accordingly to avoid a long interruption.

Subscription and Migration are performed behind the scenes...

Please wait a couple of minutes the time for the system to transition from Intelligent RPA to Build Process Automation.

Step 4 - Add and/or modify the Role Collections

Build Process Automation comes with three default Role Collections. Existing users would need either to be assigned to this role collection OR you can modify the existing Role Collections by adding the roles from Build Process Automation. For more information about the roles and role collections check this topic in our documentation.

Step 5 - Connect to Build Process Automation and Check the results

After a successful subscription and migration, you can now connect to Build Process Automation. A banner should be displayed if you connect as ProcessAutomationAdmin:

You can now check quickly the content was migrated properly and the corresponding environments as well.

Step 6 - Check or Update Agents (optional)

If you are using a recent version of the agent, agents will be automatically connected with the new URL. A restart of the agent might be needed. If this is not the case, you simply need to provide the new url to the agent. For more information check this topic in our documentation.

Step 7 - Unsubscribe (delete) SAP Intelligent RPA

Assuming that the content has been checked and agents are fully connected, you can terminate SAP Intelligent RPA for unlocking SAP Build Process Automation capabilities (including the ability to create new projects). Once unsubscribed, the "rollback" cannot happen.

 

Click Delete for SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

 

Confirm (DELETE)

If the subscription to Build Process Automation was successful, the data from Intelligent RPA is now Build Process Automation enabled. Existing data won't be deleted as they are now powered by Build Process Automation.

Final thoughts

With in-place migration we aim to run faster the transition to SAP Build Process Automation with a effortless solution.

What happens if...

While we have been working on this topic to ensure a smooth migration, if an error happens contact the support immediately and do not delete or unsubscribe.

Additional resources

  • Transition guide
  • SAP Note 3334979
  • Documentation (available soon)

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content:
Hi Joerg,

transaction /ui2/flp should point to a URL suffix like ".../sap/bc/ui2/flp?sap-client=100&sap-language=EN#Shell-home"  but not to the CRM WebUI that you mentioned below. 

In my test system the right URL comes up for both Fiori (/ui2/flp) and the CRM WebUI (wui). 

What appliance template are you using ?

Best, Joerg

PS: Sorry, wrong order in the answers now but I guess you'll find your way through...

entry.title: Re: change in URL to "vhcal<SID>ci/cs" during call IC Web...
entry.content: Ah, sorry, wrong order in the answers now but I guess you'll find your way through...

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Web Services for Concur Expense - Authentication
entry.content:
Hi Rick-

Yes, tried https://us2.api.concursolutions.com/profile/identity/v4.1/Users and getting access denied.  Just not sure if it is my Postman setup or my access, which is why I was hoping for an example to compare to mine.

entry.title: Webinar Replay: Better Business Outcomes with the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
In case you missed it ... I highly recommend reserving some time in the calendar to watch the webinar replay from April 4. Experts from SAP and PwC did a great job introducing the vector engine and its role within the retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) process. 

SAP delivered the vector engine as part of the Q1 2024 release of SAP HANA Cloud. Some noteworthy benefits include:

  • Unite all types of business data within a single database using multi-tier data storage, multi-model engines (now including vector), JSON document store, and machine learning advanced processing
  • Incorporate semantic and similarity search into intelligent data applications
  • Enhance the user experience with more natural capabilities
  • Augment and improve the output of large languge models (LLM) with contextual business data

Also, checkout these informative links for additional vector-related resources:

  • Discovery Center Hands-on Exercise: Explore the capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud, SAP Generative AI Hub, Azure OpenAI and the LangChain Framework
  • Blogpost: Vectorize your Data: SAP HANA Cloud's Vector Engine for Unified Data Excellence
  • Blogpost: From Developer's Desk: SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
  • Blogpost: What's New in SAP HANA Cloud - March 2024

entry.title: Re: PMGM form visibility to indirect reports
entry.content: Additionally, you can provide access to most of the data via reporting access and permissions.

entry.title: is it possible to fill variable on material?
entry.content:
hello,

how are you? im creating material by mm41.

is there any field in sap that i could fill "variables" to my material, like

Diameter (mm)2230
LensOpaqueTranslucent
ColorGreen and RedBlack and White
EngravingOn/OffNo engraving
Contacts1NO1NC-
IlluminationNoneWith

and search this "variables" to find it?

entry.title: Abap code to get data from table EKKO
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to check supplier purchasing history from table EKKO.

Unfortunately data is too huge to output in Excel or flat file. 

I am trying to write query in SQ02 to sort data in table EKKO according to its creation date and then select one row per supplier with latest PO date.

I am not quite familiar with ABAP so struggling to write the code.

Can someone please help or guide on this ?

SELECT LIFNR FROM EKKO
WHERE LIFNR EQ 'XXXX'.

In above statement its saying INTO is missing but I don't want to insert data I just want to modify selection criteria and output table.

Br,

Murtuza

entry.title: Re: How does a user view directly assigned items in the N...

entry.title: Re: UI5 bank account
entry.content: show us the error in console

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - shared view is not available in Database
entry.content: SAP confirmed in case that it's a limitation issue, The sharing view works on datasphere level, not at DB level, this is why the view is not replicated to another space.  I raised an improvement request #320530.

entry.title: Re: What Is Personalized Marketing? A Look at How Personalized Marketing Works, Benefits, Best Pract
entry.content: The article delves into personalized marketing and its mechanisms, offering valuable insights into how businesses can tailor their marketing strategies to individual consumers. It explores the significance of personalized marketing in enhancing customer engagement and driving conversions. Moreover, it provides practical examples and case studies to illustrate the effectiveness of personalized marketing approaches. Overall, the article serves as a comprehensive guide for businesses aiming to implement personalized marketing strategies successfully. However, it could delve deeper into the challenges and considerations associated with personalized marketing implementation. Enhancing personal reputation management for small businesses could further complement personalized marketing efforts.

entry.title: Not able to create any decision object using SAP Build process automation trial version.
entry.content:
Upon looking at the UI script , It looks like the code for decision UI is referencing an old version of the ui-core.js which is not supported. Can someone help, need to prepare for demo tomorrow 

 

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap" src="https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.111.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js" data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m" data-sap-ui-theme="sap_fiori_3" data-sap-ui-compatversion="edge" data-sap-ui-frameoptions="trusted" data-sap-ui-resourceroots="{
"com.sap.spa.rule.managedecision": "./",
"sap.rules.ui": "./sap/rules/ui"
}"></script>

entry.title: List Report Chart Does Not Display When Sorting - RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm encountering an issue with sorting fields for Dynamic measures, which are created using Annotation XML in BAS through Aggregation.ApplySupported. It appears that I might not be able to use this field for sorting purposes. Am I missing something, or is it not possible to sort by this field? Could you possibly provide me with a solution or point me towards relevant documentation?  Below are images of my error.

Thanks a lot.

Chart annotation

 

without sort

adding sort field (Dynamic measures)

List data is ok but Chart not display and I got error request (cause using orderby "CountRecordSum" this field is Dynamic Measures created on BAS)

entry.title: Quote 2.0: Post requests of a Rest Client
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am currently sending a post request with the following command in an if loop : 

RestClient.Post(url, data, headers) . The paramaters url, data and headers are already specified . The problem is that i have further commands after sending the request from the CPQ system in the if loop, that I want to execute. Once The RestClient is run, the further requests are no longer executed. 

Does anyone have any suggestions or idea, where or how I can solve such an issue ?

Best regards 

Lola

entry.title: Re: Integration of My Inbox Fiori application with SAP Launchpad service
entry.content:
Hi,

 While configuring the My Inbox- Approve Purchase Order for Purchasng Manager for S4 HANA 1909 version while implementng the oData service- C_PURCHASEORDER_FS_SRV have been facing this issue:

Metadata not loaded - See /IWBEP/ERROR_LOG in backend 'LOCAL' - Text via association '_Z_I_DIVISIONTEXT' is not unique, annotation @OBJECTMODEL.TEXT.ASSOCIATION.ique, annotation @OBJECTMODEL.TEXT.ASSOCIATION.

Even after modifying the changes aren't reflecting. 

Please support here thanks.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Web Services for Concur Expense - Authentication
entry.content:
@boot9w  -  Hi Jeff

We actually have a sample postman collection published in our User Provisioning Service Implementation Guide.   Here is a link to that page.   

SAP Concur Developer Center | User Provisioning Service Implementation Guide

The sample collection is located near the bottom of the page.   

There is also a six-part series introducing UPS, that you might find helpful to read through.   Here is a link to the first post in the series.

Introducing SAP Concur’ s Identity and User Provis... - SAP Community

I hope this helps.   

RickF

entry.title: Fleet Management SAP PM - two fuel cards
entry.content:
Dear all,

for all vehicles created as equipment we might need to add a second fuel card. Is there any possiblity to do so? If not, could you suggest maybe a good way to meet this requirement.

Thanks a lot,

Sunnyi

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Hello @kenneth_dalvik,

I love your enthusiasm about DataSphere. My company is now using DataSphere to attempt to migrate away from our BW 750 environment.  Though, there are so many basic features still missing from Datasphere that I think your predictions are a little premature.   

  • No Composite/Multiprovider function
  • Scheduling in the Integration Monitor does not support saved SAML Tokens, meaning we cannot schedule reoccurring jobs when authentication is not the SAP Idp.
  • Analytical Models do not have any concept similar to BEX Queries or perspectives to allow us to create subject area models
  • Business Builder does not support S4 Hierarchies
  • No debugger, nor execution plan view
  • No native planning support with write-back models
  • You cannot schedule SAC stories on top of DataSphere with Live connections
  • No ODATA post support (we can write to the Hana Cloud underneath, but not DS directly)

Again, while I love your positive thinking and I am a huge fan of DataSphere, I really wish SAP would step up and follow through with completing the basic functionality of DataSphere.  DataSphere is nowhere near ready to replace BW with so many basic functions missing.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: PowerBI Direct Query via HANA Cloud Calculation Views
entry.content:
Hi @chrisesco ,

Yes, you can create a new hdbrole and restrict it with the CV's you want to expose for consumption. Then, you can assign the created hdbrole to the DB user.

Regards,

Jai

entry.title: Re: Whenever I use a custom action, it opens a new object...
entry.content: I tried filling the result structure as per the article but that didn't solve the problem.

entry.title: How to Prepare for a Transition to SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello dear customers, 

The evolution of SAP Sales and Service Cloud has been nothing short of revolutionary, and it's time to transition to the latest Version 2. But how do you make this shift smoothly and efficiently?

In our recorded webcast, "How to Prepare for a Transition to SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2", our experts discuss the different phases for planning a transition journey to SAP Sales Cloud and Service Cloud Version 2. Understanding these phases can ensure a successful transition while mitigating risks.

 

Transitioning to a new cloud version isn't something you do overnight. It's a journey. In our webcast, we talk about each phase and some of the services or tools to help you with this objective. 

 

  • Exploration Phase: Understand what the new version offers and how it aligns with your business goals.
  • Assessment Phase: Evaluate your current system's readiness for the transition. This phase features our handy tool, the "Readiness Check".
  • Planning Phase: Develop a detailed strategy for the transition.
  • Transition Phase: Execute your strategy. Here, the "Data Transfer Tool" becomes your indispensable ally.
  • Monitoring Phase: Keep track of the transition progress, ensuring everything is on the right path.
  • Test and Cutover Phase: Test your new system thoroughly and switch operations to it.
  • Go-live and Beyond: Celebrate your successful transition and plan for continuous improvement.
 

 Also, this webcast explores the concept of "extensibility transition". This involves adapting your current customizations and extensions to align with the new version. It's about making your new system truly yours.

We invite you to learn more about this exciting transition and equip yourself with the knowledge and tools necessary to make it a success. Watch the recorded webcast [here] and embrace the future of SAP Sales and Service Cloud. The future is Version 2, and it's here today. 

Remember, the transition to a new system version is not just about technology upgrades, it's about business transformation. And we are here to guide you every step of the way.

If you would like to know more about different CX Solutions, join us by subscribing to the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps program. Access expert guidance, best practices, and a thriving community to optimize your SAP experience. Visit this link for more information and to subscribe today!

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content: Deleted

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
Hi JWiseman, thanks for your reply. I am using SAP Crystal Reports 2016 Support Pack 6 Version 14.2.6.2839. Product Type: Full.

Formula for the first group: If {Table1.status} startswith 'Renewal' And {Table1.ST_LIC_EXPIRE} in DateAdd("yyyy", -1, CurrentDate) To CurrentDate Then True Else False.

Thanks for the tip on using the Change Group Option. When I select Use a Formula as Group Sort Order, it takes me to the Current Formula Folder X-1 Group Sort Order Formula. However, even though the formula I stated earlier was accepted in the Formula Fields folder, I receive an error pasting it in the Group Sort Order Formula section that {Table1.status} needs to be a constant expression.

The above should return records that meet those criteria. Then I want the next set of records that are expired to show in the next section of the report (the second criteria from my initial posting.

entry.title: Re: declare an include type dynamically
entry.content: Dynamic creation (means creation at runtime) of data type and dynamic calling are two completely different things. If I understand well your main question, you want to pass any type to a parameter of a method, so you should type it ANY. Please edit your question to clarify it.

entry.title: Re: declare an include type dynamically
entry.content: For information, if you need to create a data type dynamically (not sure if it's really what you need), DON'T use the old method cl_alv_table_create=>create_dynamic_table. Instead, use the official and much more powerful RTTS (cl_abap_typedescr, etc.) The forum is full of examples. Reason to NOT use: Alternative to CL_ALV_TABLE_CREATE=>CREATE_DYNAMIC... - SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Converting a custom tcodes output into Local File throws runtime error
entry.content: You forgot to attach the dump file (text file).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

My name is Marina, I am from Brazil and have graduated in Administration. I do identify myself as a person to participate into the SAP Learning journey.

I am 37 years old, have recently started a SAP course in Logistics and now I am eager to start the learning journey in Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement. I am a recently mother of a three month old babygirl and I am trying to have a job, which has been my barrier since I’ve moved to Portugal in 2019.

I strongly believe this SAP Learning Journey will be a game changer into my career and I am looking forward to embrace this new chapter of my life.

Thank you for the wonderful opportunity.

Warm regards,

Marina Sousa

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: Re: format date after deploy app
entry.content: I think it is normal, local run didn't consider the user profile setting from abap server.

entry.title: Re: opening period
entry.content: It's like CREATION DATE of Prod Order...

entry.title: Re: Abap code to get data from table EKKO
entry.content: I don't understand your question: with SELECT, you must store the read data into memory! So, you say that you are writing ABAP code in an infoset, but you don't say where in the infoset... If you have choosen to use a Data reading program as source, you must load the data into memory. Please clarify.

entry.title: Re: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(ODat...
entry.content: Hi Amit, It seems your latest reply is not captured in the post.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Web Services for Concur Expense - Authentication
entry.content:
@boot9w - Check the scopes in your application.  For the above, I listed the scopes necessary to get tokens.  Each Concur API requires different scopes.  Based on your post, it looks like you need one or more identity.*.read scopes to be added to your application.

The scopes allow you to control what data each application has access to and what it can do (read versus update).  That way you can prevent accidental misuse.

entry.title: Re: Cyrstal Reports Unable to open report in CR Enterprise
entry.content: Hi Don,

entry.title: Re: Mexico DRC - Invoice rejected - schema xml issue
entry.content: Thank you very much for the answers. But that's exactly the point of my problem. On the S4 side I have the correct xml, when the iflow standard (SAP integration suite) calls EDICOM it is calling in this old format/version. Where should I change so that the iflw standard does not change the format of tags and version for older version?

entry.title: Extending the MD_SUPPLIER master fiori transactional app
entry.content:
Hi I want to extend standard Transactional FIORI app MD_SUPPLIER_MASTER with three fields using table control in a new tab. Can someone guide how to achieve this. 

 

I tried extending the structures INCL_EEW_LFA1 and INCL_EEW_LFA1_X with the Z fields and also extrending the Interface view I_BUSINESSPARTNERSupplierTP with the same fields. When i Extend the C_BUSINESSPARTNERSUPLR with these fields the app is failing.

extend view C_BusinessPartnerSupplier with ZCDS_VIEW_BP
association to zminoritystatus as minstat

on $projection.businesspartner = minstat.partner
{

minstat.zzmindk,

}

How to acheive the scenario?

entry.title: 3018751 - Change Audit Report for Manage Role-Based Permission Access page
entry.content:
Are there any news regarding the possibility to audit on changes on "Manage Role-Based Permission Access"?

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003018751 latest update is > 3 years ago. Any updates?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Abap code to get data from table EKKO
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

Thanks for replying.

I am writing code inside infoset-- code section -- Free code.

I am just trying to filter selection programmatically as data is too huge to output. I am trying to write select statement in infoset to select only desired data. Goal is to sort table EKKO depending on creation date and then output lastest po date per supplier. So let's say one supplier has 1000 PO so only row with latest PO date is needed for that supplier.

I just felt writing query might help and I am not sure whether this type of requirement can be accommodated here.

Thank you.
